checks.requirement: AAAI source must exist locally and not be a dataless placeholder.
Official AAAI-27 style file must be present.
Submission source must use the official AAAI submission style.

checks.evidence: author block is anonymous and local identity strings are absent
checks.requirement: AAAI double-anonymous source must not expose author identity.
Dedicated anonymous AAAI source must exist locally.
Anonymous AAAI source must include code availability without named identity or GitHub URL.
Named AAAI source must contain author metadata and the public release URL.
AAAI source must include the core method-paper sections.

checks.evidence: source identifies all five official erasers, 200 runs, and the zero-proxy boundary
checks.requirement: AAAI source must describe the current official baseline matrix without proxy rows.
Theory section should include explicit false-acceptance control.

checks.evidence: source squarely attributes finite-family testing and distinguishes VERA from LTT and Prompt Risk Control
checks.requirement: AAAI source should preempt the closest-prior-work objection.

checks.evidence: source identifies pinned official baselines, excludes proxy rows, and states explicit non-novelty boundaries
checks.requirement: AAAI source must not overclaim baseline or method novelty.

checks.evidence: source states Camelyon17/GaitPDB are not clinical deployment evidence
checks.requirement: Medical benchmark language must not imply clinical deployment readiness.
AAAI source should remain plausibly within the 7-page technical limit.
Local final AAAI PDF compilation requires PDFLaTeX or Tectonic.
